commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8654a6ea26482d6b1bb0a871bf2fbad2b116050d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local Feishu markdown-table counter and changes auto-mode reply dispatch to use post mode when more than five tables are detected.

PR surface: Source +15. Total +15 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection shows the current auto-card paths and Feishu docs identify the vendor limits, but the PR has no proof artifacts and I did not run live Feishu.
commands.review_followup: Do not queue automation while external real behavior proof is missing; the contributor or maintainer should fix the review findings and add Feishu proof before merge.

target.title: fix(feishu): fall back to post mode when markdown tables exceed card limit
target.body:
## Problem

When an agent generates a reply containing more than 5 Markdown tables, the Feishu plugin detects tables and sends the message as an interactive card. However, Feishu cards have a hard limit of **5 table components** per card (`ErrCode: 11310; card table number over limit`). Messages exceeding this limit fail silently and end up in the delivery queue where they retry indefinitely but never succeed.

## Solution

Count Markdown tables before deciding to use card mode. When the text contains more than 5 tables (outside fenced code blocks), fall back to post mode instead. Post mode uses `convertMarkdownTables(text, "code")` which converts tables to code blocks — reliable, already existing code path.

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts`: Added `countMarkdownTables()` helper and `MAX_FEISHU_CARD_TABLES` constant. Modified `useCard` decision to check table count before choosing card mode.

## Testing

- Verified that 5 tables → card mode (works)
- Verified that 6 tables → API returns `ErrCode: 11310` (confirmed hard limit is exactly 5)
- Verified that 7 tables → falls back to post mode, message delivered successfully
- Verified that tables inside fenced code blocks are excluded from count

## Backward Compatibility

- No change for messages with ≤5 tables
- No change for `renderMode: "card"` (explicit)
- No change for messages without tables
